[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111000 5
1 00001100 2
2 10000000 1
3 10101010 4
4 00000011 2
5 00101101 4
6 01100010 3
7 00011111 5

01 10 10100111 5
12 21 10100100 3
23 32 10001001 3
34 43 11101011 6
45 54 11110100 5
56 65 00010101 3
67 76 10001101 4
70 07 00001101 3

02 20 00000011 2 match 4
13 31 00101101 4 match 5
24 42 01100010 3 match 6
35 53 00011111 5 match 7
46 64 11100001 4
57 75 10011000 3
60 06 10000000 1 match 2
71 17 10101010 4 match 3

47 74 01101100 4
50 05 10010101 4
61 16 00100111 4
72 27 00001110 3
